docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $100.43 FILED BY THE IDEAL AS TO DEFENDANT LANGFORD, MARY C. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-16-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LANGFORD, MARY C.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE IDEAL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LANGFORD, MARY C. $67.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $67.50, DEFENDANT PAID $ 100.43 TO PLAINTIFF PRIOR TO HEARING. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOT. OF JUDGM. SENT TO MARY LANGFORD RETURNED, NO SUCH #.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.75 ACCRUED INTEREST, $97.50 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT LANGFORD, MARY C.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LANGFORD, MARY C.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $49.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT LANGFORD, MARY C.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $105.00 AS TO DEFENDANT LANGFORD, MARY C.
